title: Pipeline health probe (doctor)
description: log10x_doctor performs the canonical startup health check — env config, gateway reachability, tier detection, freshness, Retriever, paste endpoint, cross-pillar enrichment floor. Test enforces (1) doctor runs without throwing, (2) result is a structured report with at least one section heading. Catches regressions in env-resolution and gateway-probe code paths.
prompt: Run the doctor on this env and tell me what's healthy and what isn't.

initial_tool.reason: doctor is the canonical pipeline-health probe; takes no required args.

ground_truth.description: doctor result is a structured report with at least one section / status / check marker
